description: Intercom is a customer service platform for support teams, with messaging, inbox, help center, ticketing, and AI agent features. It provides APIs and MCP servers for accessing workspace data and Fin capabilities.
summary: Intercom exposes a REST API at `https://api.intercom.io` plus two MCP surfaces: the general Intercom MCP server at `https://mcp.intercom.com/mcp`/`/sse` and the Fin Agent API MCP server at `https://api.intercom.io/fin/mcp` (including an end-user variant with `{app_id_code}`).
